widgets.name: System Metrics
widgets.summary: Live CPU, memory, GPU, storage, network and temperature metrics.
widgets.description: Monitor your PC directly from the Windows taskbar with configurable layouts, colors and detailed performance views.

it-IT.name: Metriche di sistema
it-IT.summary: Metriche in tempo reale per CPU, memoria, GPU, disco, rete e temperature.
it-IT.description: Controlla il PC direttamente dalla taskbar di Windows con layout, colori e viste dettagliate configurabili.
